Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mutatsu stinks of alcohol[n]more than he usually does...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He must have been drinking a lot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 30 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Don't you think it's... *hic* rude to make sum'one wait?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 30 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}You alwaysh call me an ol' bastard, but you're only nice whenever ya need sum money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 30 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}...Tch, Ignorin' me? Well, *hic* I guessh I can't ecshpect much from a kid of your generation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 30 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I thought you got in an' dropped dead somewhere or somethin'...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 30 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Where the hell were ya wanderin' around? Iss late![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}A friend, huh? A girl? It's a girl, ain't it? Even though you're still sponging off your parents...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Studyin'!? What, you wanna go to college so you can work at some big company?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 30 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 0 25 25}Don't bother... Even if you busht your ass... Don'tcha remember what you and your mom did to me...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}But watch your mouth! Who the hell do you think raished you, huh!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Wh-What the...? All this time, I thought you were... I guess my eyesight is getting bad after all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems Mutatsu was worried about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]Mutatsu a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...Spending all my time with clients... Missing anniversaries and birthdays...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 0 25 25}I wonder if they felt the same way I did, when I was waiting for you earlier...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}My wife and son... We were all together back when I was still a businessman.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}It's already been four years now... since they left me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Before I became a monk... I was a plain ol' businessman. The three of us were just a typical family.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}But, they both left me... My wife and my son... It's been four years now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I used to stay out past midnight all the time, and my wife and I would always fight about it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}...Now when I go home, I don't know what to do with myself, so I just come here and drink every night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}O-Of course not! They're the ones that abandoned me y'know!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Besides... after all this time... I don't know how to face them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}Yeah... You're absolutely right. I shaved my head, but that was just for show...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I get drunk to avoid facing my problems... So, yeah, I guess you could say I'm runnin' away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...She hasn't contacted me since then. They must've gotten over me already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 3 25 25}I have no idea where they are... Or if they'd even wanna see me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Alright, kid, enough of the depressing talk. Let's get outta here. I wanna go home and take a shower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I left the club with Mutatsu.[n]{f 1 1}
